title: Wooded
description: revamps wood crafting a bit (stairs and buttons are cheaper, adds logs to sticks & chests recipes)
body:
This mod focuses in dealing with some unlogical stuff within woodworking as well as adds small QOL changes to craft faster.

**Crafting**       
You now get 8 instead of 4 stairs.  
You also get 4 buttons instead of one when crafting them.       

You can now combine 2 logs to make 16 sticks  
and 4 logs to make 2 chests.    

*Final Note:* all recipes work with all wood types so thats neat.   
    
*made with MCreator*
